MINI MINUTES: Defendant Anne Doyle's Motion for Order Allowing Case to Proceed to Mediation in Liew of Judicial Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or objection tentative ruling to Remove matter from Arbitration is adopted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration, (Doe amendment filed).
